creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
Send2Trash3k is a small package that sends files to the Trash (or Recycle Bin)
*natively* and on *all platforms*.

WWW: http://hg.hardcoded.net/send2trash
WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/Send2Trash3k/

Fix: Please add attachment as deskutils/send2trash3k

Shar is also here

https://github.com/nemysis/FreeBSD_Ports/blob/master/pr/deskutils/send2trash3k.shar

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Build log

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130617165300-43857/


On RedPorts is default installed py27-distribute

depend_object

===>  Checking if devel/py-distribute already installed
===>   An older version of devel/py-distribute is already installed (py27-distribute-0.6.35)
      You may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install this port again
      by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.
      If you really wish to overwrite the old port of devel/py-distribute
      without deleting it first, set the variable "FORCE_PKG_REGISTER"
      in your environment or the "make install" command line.
*** [check-already-installed] Error code 1

Stop in /a/ports/devel/py-distribute.
*** [build-depends] Error code 1

Stop in /a/ports/deskutils/send2trash3k.
